title: Gisela Graham Christmas Candle Ring Red Rose for 1" Dinner Candle Set of 2
description: Product description This Gisela Graham Christmas Candle Ring is the perfect addition to your holiday decor. Designed to fit a 1-inch dinner candle, it has a 12cm overall diameter and is also available in a 3-inch ring size. The candle ring is decorated with a beautiful red rose design, making it a festive and elegant choice for your home. Made of wax with a glass container, it features a rose scent that will fill your room with a delightful holiday aroma. This product is part of the Gisela Graham London brand and is suitable for both modern and traditional home styles. The set includes two candle rings, and it is recommended for home fragrance use. The dimensions of the product are 6 centimeters in height and 12 centimeters in diameter. This item is a unisex product and is ideal for winter and Christmas occasions. The product type is a candle, and it is specifically designed for floral Christmas decoration. Safety Warning [GENERAL] Candles must be kept away from flammable materials, should not be left unattended, must be monitored for burning time, and must be disposed of properly.
